title: eriastrum
intro: Eriastrum is a genus of flowering plants in the borage family (Boraginaceae), commonly known as the fairy candles due to their delicate and vibrant appearance. The plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations and wounds. Eriastrum has been used to treat a variety of health issues, including colds, fever, and respiratory problems, due to its expectorant and decongestant properties. Herbal preparations of Eriastrum, such as teas and tinctures, are commonly used in traditional medicine to promote overall health and well-being.
